summary: Senior Python Developer with 6+ years building production GenAI systems, FastAPI microservices, and scalable backend infrastructure. Specialized in LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, multi-agent workflows, and async API design across AWS and Azure. Track record of shipping high-throughput services, improving retrieval relevance, and reducing inference cost through smart caching and model selection.

experience.title: Senior Python Developer (GenAI Platform)
experience.description: Built a Python-based GenAI platform powering enterprise workflow automation. Designed FastAPI microservices and hybrid RAG pipelines on Kubernetes, integrating LangChain, Pinecone, and AWS Bedrock to deliver high-throughput, low-latency conversational AI.
achievements: Designed and shipped production FastAPI microservices serving 600K+ daily API calls with sub-2-second p95 latency using async/await and connection pooling
Architected a hybrid RAG retrieval pipeline (LangChain + Pinecone + Weaviate) that improved answer relevance by 28%
Implemented LangGraph-based multi-step agent workflows with tool calling, conditional routing, and state management for complex task resolution
Cut end-to-end pipeline latency by 18% through query tuning, Redis caching, and connection pooling; reduced PostgreSQL CPU utilization by ~25% at peak
Built CI/CD pipelines in Jenkins and GitHub Actions automating lint, type checks, unit tests, and Docker image publishing to ECR
Mentored two junior engineers on async patterns, testing best practices, and production debugging

experience.title: Python Developer (Clinical AI)
experience.description: Developed PHI-compliant Python services on AWS for processing clinical documents and physician notes. Built data pipelines, FastAPI APIs, and healthcare-focused RAG workflows leveraging AWS Bedrock and vector stores.
achievements: Built PHI-compliant Python data pipelines processing clinical notes from multiple source systems; improved data quality by 30%
Shipped FastAPI services exposing document summarization, semantic search, and adverse-event extraction, reducing manual review effort by 35%
Engineered RAG pipelines using LangChain and LlamaIndex with Weaviate; improved precision@k by 22%
Integrated AWS Bedrock (Claude) for regulatory document summarization and clinical text classification
Implemented OAuth2/JWT authentication and RBAC across all internal PHI APIs; tightened least-privilege access
Deployed containerized services on AWS EKS with Helm charts, autoscaling, and zero-downtime rolling updates

experience.title: Python Developer / BI Engineer
experience.description: Built workflow automation and operational reporting platforms. Focused on automating data validation, reporting pipelines, and Linux job orchestration across operational datasets.
achievements: Built Python automation scripts reducing manual validation cycle time by 40%
Developed REST API integrations with JIRA and internal tools for sprint tracking and reporting
Optimized MySQL queries and indexed views supporting reporting pipelines; cut dashboard load times by 50%
Designed config-driven Python utilities making automation reusable across business units
Delivered Power BI operational dashboards giving Scrum teams real-time visibility into sprint metrics

experience.title: Python Developer Intern
experience.description: Supported business intelligence and reporting initiatives by building Python ETL pipelines, SQL transformations, and Tableau dashboards.
achievements: Wrote Python ETL scripts using Pandas and NumPy for SQL Server data; improved data prep efficiency by 30%
Built reusable Python utility libraries for transformations used across multiple analyst projects
Optimized T-SQL queries reducing data load times by 25%
Built Tableau dashboards (KPI scorecards, drill-downs) for enterprise stakeholders
